Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
ref: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.102, p.1 (1967)
title: Isobaric analogue states of 47Ca

x4freetext: Isobaric analogue states of 47Ca

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.102, p.1 (1967)

x4freetext: The 4 MeV Van de Graaff accelerator was
used.
Two silicon surface barrier detectors and
a 2*256 pulse-height analyser were used.
The 46Ca target with natural relative abundance of
Ca - 0.0033% was used. The thickness in 46Ca was about
15 ug/cm2. The isotopic purity was better than 99%.
Inhomogeneities in the target thickness made it
necessary to measure relative yields in two angles.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.

reacs.QuantHlp: Differential c/s d/dA relative to 90 deg.

x4freetext: Statistical error

x4code.shortRef: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.102, p.1 (1967)

SD: SF8=RSD/REL -> RSD in REACTION code.
Data units were changed (ARB-UNITS -> NO-DIM). The
accuracy of data presentation was revised. BIB updated.
Data from Subent 003 were added.
